offer: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, manual submission causes delays in claim processing. We convert claim forms into electronic submissions instead of manual submission of paper forms.
problem: Manual submission of claim forms leads to delays in processing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among brokers
try_it: Let users try form scanning and electronic submission on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing claim data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline steps in the onboarding process
